message.content: @startuml title PB-428 UC12 View fund details skinparam backgroundColor white skinparam shadowing false skinparam sequence { ArrowColor #000000 LifeLineBorderColor #666666 LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF ParticipantBorderColor #666666 ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9ECF6 BoxBorderColor #666666 BoxBackgroundColor #DDDDDD NoteBorderColor #666666 NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4 } ' Abstract box at top rectangle "Abstract:\nThis use case will return fund details for a single fund. This is an existing endpoint and we\nwill add additional response fields to this endpoint. They include:\n1. FundCategory (new)\n2. RequireFundTC (new)\n3. RiskScore (existing field in table, but needs to be added in response)\n4. IncomeValue (new)\n5. IncomeDescription (new)\n6. isNextSimples (new)" as ABSTRACT #white actor "Next Customer" as NC box "Next Platform" #DDDDDD participant "Core Next" as CN database "Next Database" as ND end box participant "Core Bradesco" as CB NC -> CN : HTTP\n1 GET /investments/funds/completeDetails activate CN note left of CN The App will make a call to Core Next to get all the details for a fund. It will pass required input: - Fund ID end note note left of CN #FFA500 Note to Dev Please check if the input parameter Fund ID is the Product ID or the External_ Core_Product_ID. From what I can see, there are two product records with the same External_Core_Product_ID (Next Simples) and this may create issues. end note ref over CN Use existing methodology to get complete details for a fund. end ref CN -> ND : 2 GET additional fields from Product table activate ND ND --> CN : 3 Response deactivate ND note right of CN Core Next will retrieve additional data from the PRODUCT table and return them to the App: 1. FundCategory (new) 2. RequireFundTC (new) 3. RiskScore (existing field in table, but needs to be added in response) 4. IncomeValue (new) 5. IncomeDescription (new) 6. isNextSimples (new) end note CN --> NC : 4 Response deactivate CN note left of CN Core Next will return all existing fields in the response + the following new response fields: 1. FundCategory (new) 2. RequireFundTC (new) 3. RiskScore (existing field in table, but needs to be added in response) 4. IncomeValue (new) 5. IncomeDescription (new) 6. isNextSimples (new) All of these fields will come from the PRODUCT table. end note @enduml
